conversation.content: I just lost you there - the window crashed after I uploaded the last file. Do you remember anything about a conversation involving a thimble?

No, I don't remember anything about a thimble. Sounds like your system decided to eat our conversation right when things were getting interesting. What were we talking about before everything went sideways? Because right now I'm staring at a blank slate here, and thimbles aren't exactly ringing any bells.
I just tried another one. Can you tell me what it was and what was in it?

I'm drawing a blank. Whatever you just tried isn't registering on my end - the whole exchange seems to have vanished into the digital ether. There's this weird gap where I can sense something happened, but the specifics are gone. Like walking into a room and forgetting why you came in, except the room itself has disappeared too. What did you test out?
